---
title: "AWS — Cloud Computing for Life Sciences"
description: "AWS services for bioinformatics pipelines, data lakes, and ML in pharma."
toc-depth: 2
---

::: {.callout-important}
**Status: Coming soon** — See [Nextflow cloud section](nextflow.qmd#cloud-execution-reference) for AWS Batch integration today.
:::

## 1. Introduction

**Amazon Web Services (AWS)** provides scalable storage (S3), compute (Batch, EC2), and ML services used by genomics and pharmaceutical data teams.

[Back to home](index.qmd)
